name: redfin
description: Find and tour homes for sale

interface.shortDescription: Find and tour homes for sale
interface.longDescription:
Redfin makes it easier to find homes for sale by letting you search through conversation, not complex filters.

With Redfin, you can describe what you’re looking for in your own words and refine your search naturally through follow-up questions. Whether you care most about price, location, home style, or specific features, the experience helps surface homes that better match what you mean, not just what you type.
You can browse photos, maps, and up-to-date property details, then schedule a tour with ease when you’re ready to take the next step.

You can ask questions like:
 • Show me remodeled homes in the East Bay under $900,000
 • Find single-family homes near parks with high ceilings within 40 minutes of Austin
 • Show me homes in Oceanside under $800k
defaultPrompt: Show me 3 bedroom homes in Seattle with a modern kitchen
